Interface OpenApi31Document

All Superinterfaces:
Document, Extensible, Node, OpenApi31Extensible, OpenApi31SecurityRequirementsParent, OpenApi31ServersParent, OpenApi3xDocument, OpenApi3xExtensible, OpenApi3xSecurityRequirementsParent, OpenApi3xServersParent, OpenApiDocument, OpenApiExtensible, OpenApiSecurityRequirementsParent, OpenApiServersParent, RootNode, SecurityRequirementsParent, ServersParent, Visitable
All Known Implementing Classes:
OpenApi31DocumentImpl
public interface OpenApi31Document extends RootNode, OpenApi3xDocument, OpenApi31Extensible, OpenApi31ServersParent, OpenApi31SecurityRequirementsParent
